series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on employees that have filed an Unfair Labor Practice. Records may include: Complaint, Investigation Packet, State Employee Relations Board Ruling; supporting documentation and any other record generated or received by the agency in relation to the filing.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Records are maintained three (3) calendar years from date matter is resolved. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Records are maintained three (3) calendar years from date matter is resolved. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
